version.def: an interpretation of a matter from a particular viewpoint
ex: his version of the fight was different from mine

victim.def: an unfortunate person who suffers from some adverse circumstance

victory.def: a successful ending of a struggle or contest
ex: the general always gets credit for his army's victory

virtual.def: being actually such in almost every respect
ex: the once elegant temple lay in virtual ruin

virus.def: (virology) ultramicroscopic infectious agent that replicates itself only within cells of living hosts

ex: he had a vision of his own death

vitamin.def: any of a group of organic substances essential in small quantities to normal metabolism

volume.def: the amount of 3-dimensional space occupied by an object
ex: the gas expanded to twice its original volume

volunteer.def: (military) a person who freely enlists for service

vote.def: a choice that is made by counting the number of people in favor of each alternative
ex: there were only 17 votes in favor of the motion
they allowed just one vote per person

wake.def: the consequences of an event (especially a catastrophic event)
ex: in the wake of the accident no one knew how many had been injured

walker.def: New Zealand runner who in 1975 became the first person to run a mile in less that 3 minutes and 50 seconds (born in 1952)

ex: a warning that still more bombs could explode

washing.def: the work of cleansing (usually with soap and water)

waste.def: any materials unused and rejected as worthless or unwanted
ex: they collect the waste once a week
much of the waste material is carried off in the sewers

wave.def: one of a series of ridges that moves across the surface of a liquid (especially across a large body of water)

wealthy.def: having an abundant supply of money or possessions of value

weapon.def: any instrument or instrumentality used in fighting or hunting
ex: he was licensed to carry a weapon

web.def: an intricate network suggesting something that was formed by weaving or interweaving
ex: the trees cast a delicate web of shadows over the lawn

wedding.def: the social event at which the ceremony of marriage is performed

weight.def: the vertical force exerted by a mass as a result of gravity

whatever.def: one or some or every or all without specification
ex: give me whatever peaches you don't want

wheel.def: a simple machine consisting of a circular frame with spokes (or a solid disc) that can rotate on a shaft or axle (as in vehicles or other machines)

whisper.def: speaking softly without vibration of the vocal cords

wide.def: with or by a broad space

wild.def: a wild primitive state untouched by civilization
ex: they collected mushrooms in the wild

wildlife.def: all living things (except people) that are undomesticated
ex: chemicals could kill all the wildlife

willing.def: the act of making a choice

wind.def: air moving (sometimes with considerable force) from an area of high pressure to an area of low pressure
ex: trees bent under the fierce winds
when there is no wind, row

winner.def: the contestant who wins the contest

ex: he was above all wishing and desire
I listened to his words very closely

worldwide.def: spanning or extending throughout the entire world

worried.def: afflicted with or marked by anxious uneasiness or trouble or grief

worse.def: something inferior in quality or condition or effect
ex: accused of cheating and lying and worse

wound.def: an injury to living tissue (especially an injury involving a cut or break in the skin)

youth.def: a young person (especially a young man or boy)

zone.def: a locally circumscribed place characterized by some distinctive features
